name: LociGraph
description: AI-assisted claim extraction and knowledge graph app: Postgres/pgvector, Redis, FastAPI backend, worker, frontend, and Caddy.

migration.rollback: Stop the locigraph Compose project on oreochiserver; no canonical migration has been performed yet.
notes: Still running from /home/oreo/LociGraph, not the canonical /srv/argus/workloads layout.
backend and caddy are bound to 0.0.0.0 (ports 8000 and 8090); needs firewall/bind remediation before any access grant.
Ports remapped to avoid host conflicts: postgres 15432, redis 16379, caddy 8090.

requirements: No backup execution allowed until sensitive-data classification and env/secret handling are reviewed.

notes: Handles JWT auth, an OpenAI API key, and an app login password as environment variables.
backend (8000) and caddy (8090) are bound to 0.0.0.0; verify firewall posture before any access grant.
Postgres and Redis are also host-exposed (15432, 16379); confirm no unintended external reachability.
